Exit {{ trade().close_rate | number: '1.2-2' }} {{ exitDate() }}
Duration {{ durationHours() }}h ({{ durationBars() }} bars)

Tag {{ trade().enter_tag }}
}
Exit {{ trade().exit_reason }}
